mapper.sql: id, request_no, TO_CHAR(request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, plan_id, order_no, customer_nm, supplier_nm, site_nm, work_category, approval_status, memo, remarks, product_category, material_nm, thickness, unit_type, width, height, quantity, unrequested_quantity, requested_quantity, area
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hkgn.work_request ORDER BY request_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM hkgn.work_request WHERE request_date = TO_DATE(#{requestDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM hkgn.work_request WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hkgn.work_request ( request_no, request_date, plan_id, order_no, customer_nm, site_nm, work_category, approval_status, product_category, material_nm, thickness, unit_type, width, height, quantity, requested_quantity, unrequested_quantity, area, remarks ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, TO_DATE(#{requestDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{planId}, #{orderNo}, #{customerNm}, #{siteNm}, #{workCategory}, #{approvalStatus}, #{productCategory}, #{materialNm}, #{thickness}, #{unitType}, #{width}, #{height}, #{quantity}, #{requestedQuantity}, #{unrequestedQuantity}, #{area}, #{remarks} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hkgn.work_request WHERE request_no = #{requestNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE hkgn.work_request SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE hkgn.work_request SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, updated_at = now() WHERE id IN
#{id}
